title: Ubiquiti UC-Cast-Pro, Ubiquiti Display Cast Pro
category: Ubiquiti UC-Cast-Pro, Ubiquiti Display Cast Pro
description: Display Cast Pro is a new playback device designed for all standard HDMI screens. The device can operate in two modes: video playback or web mode (standard web browsing). The player can be connected to the internet via an Ethernet cable with PoE support or using Wi-Fi at 2.4 GHz or 5 GHz. The player also features a USB-C port, which can be used to connect peripherals or as a power supply Playback device Wall mount Wall plugs and screws (2) Zip ties Drilling template
specsSearch: Wireless features WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11ac, 802.11b/g, 802.11ax Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps Power Power over Ethernet Yes Power type PoE, USB-C PoE type PoE-In (only) PoE-Out standards 802.3af
